pi_items.source: Verified via curl returning 404 Not Found, and setup_task.sh fallback logic.
Verified via export_result.sh and verifier.py which target this path.
Verified via export_result.sh and verifier.py which target this path for VLM evaluation.
Verified via setup_task.sh generating the starter script at this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated 6-row fallback dataset with 3 metabolites because the claimed dataset_url returns a 404 error. The agent is required to write an R script to /home/ga/RProjects/cachexia_analysis.R, process the dataset to compute ground-truth Log2FC and BH-adjusted p-values, and output the exact expected CSV to /home/ga/RProjects/output/metabolomics_results.csv and a Volcano plot to /home/ga/RProjects/output/volcano_plot.png.
